TB-1 Cognitive Difficulty.design_implication: Trigger dynamic scaffolding, simplify vocabulary, offer alternative explanation formats (e.g., visual vs text).

TB-2 Engagement & Motivation Problem.design_implication: Incorporate micro-rewards, progress visualization, and shorter, chunked learning milestones.

TB-4 System Usability Issues.design_implication: Fallback to offline mode, optimize asset delivery, gracefully degrade UX during high latency.

TB-7 Content Quality Mismatch.design_implication: Route user to prerequisite diagnostic test, realign curriculum path to current ZPD.

TB-3 Lack of Learning Support.design_implication: Activate AI Mentor (Qwen/TinyLlama) for real-time Q&A, suggest relevant question banks.

TB-6 Cost / Affordability Barrier.design_implication: Highlight freemium pathways, unlock targeted micro-scholarships based on effort.
